isA: Page

ex - Out of, Out from. Latin.
rhizome - Rhízōma "mass of roots." Ancient Greek.

Now over forty years after Deleuze and Guattari's seminal work, [[A Thousand Plateaus]], the internet manifested it's transgressive vision. Soon a wave of capital intensive territorialization spread over that. Now LLMs and modern AI, with impenetrable choices shows how deeply the structure of things has never fit into the pure logical categories of things, like the [[Neats]] had wished.

Here an experiment, can AI take us further, and breath a sort of life to the words?

Developed by [[Alex]]

Visit https://example.com for more information.
